title: Bane of Arthropods Addon
description: Let Creepers be affected by Bane of Arthropods!
body:
## Bane of Arthropods: Nobody uses it
To address this, the German YouTuber BastiGHG recently suggested that **Creepers could also be affected by this enchantment**, giving it a real use case. -> [Link to the mentioned Short](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/-7mD0PUO3N4)

---

This and nothing more or less does this small datapack.

---

_(Let's just ignore that bisected statue and artworks revealing it's supposed to have bones...)_

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  _Now you know... o.0_

</details>
